review_text: Preis Leistung stimmt hier, besonders wenn man die Lage beachtet. Die Sanitärausstattungen sind ein wenig in die Jahre gekommen, aber es war bei meiner Nutzung immer sauber. BBQ’s auch nutzbar und auch eine Küche vorhanden. Der späte Check-In hat auch gut funktioniert und war intuitiv.
Nice Park. Cheap price. Very good conditions (clean toilets, showers, bbq area, kitchen)

Good park in central location, right opposite Busselton Jetty precinct and a short walk to the town centre.  Helpful and friendly staff who assist in getting into your site - some can be tight to get into due to narrow roads.|Downside is there is nowhere to pull in when trying to check in.|Be aware there are 3 locations for this park, the other two being further away from the Busselton Jetty area.
Such a great spot - we particularly loved being in the quieter site further down the road from the jetty (Site 2). Clean and tidy facilities. A lovely beach 2 min walk away and restaurants close by.

The staff were absolutely fantastic – 10/10 service and very friendly throughout the stay.

However, there are a few areas that could be improved. The kitchen facilities were disappointing, particularly with issues around food being taken from the fridge. Installing CCTV in that area could act as a strong deterrent. The showers would also benefit from having curtains for better privacy.

Additionally, there were many unsupervised children running around and yelling on the camp roads. Given that large 4WDs use these roads and have significant blind spots, better supervision or clearer safety measures would really help.

Finally, having a gate or some form of fencing could improve security and prevent random people from walking through the park.

My partner attended the park to make a simple inquiry with a staff member at the front desk and was met with an extremely dismissive rude staff member. Customer service should make guests feel welcome and valued, but this interaction did the exact opposite. I understand that everyone has off days, but professionalism and basic courtesy should always be maintained.
Nice place to stay.  Lovely room with plenty of space.
Fantastic location-walking distance to Main Street-Jetty Area- nice clean amenities -excellent value

Lovely caravan park close to Jetty and water front. Nice and quiet.|Just a short walk to the amenities block - which can be a bit long in the middle of the night!. Good lighting and amenities block clean and tidy. Camp Kitchen looked good but we didnt use.|Would recommend this as a great central place to stay.
Plenty of room for caravans.
Big van sites, walking distance from town and the jetty. Clean, big amenities, |Great park to explore Busselton and the foreshore

Location, location, location. Walking distance from the world famous Busso Jetty & foreshore (& we were in Park 3 - the far away one). Simple park, no pool, jumping pillows or play equipment for the kids, but the facilities were always clean, the BBQs were free & the noise died down every night by about 9pm.

We had a powered site & they were spacious enough, well shaded by trees & close to everything. Had a camp kitchen, laundry, clotheslines, undercover pergola etc. Don't remember how much they cost, but it was no frills & done well.

Like a ham, cheese & tomato toasted sandwich. Just dependable & good, because you can't eat brisket everyday. 4.3 stars.
Great caravan park! New management is doing brilliantly

Fantastic location, walking distance to the beach, town and restaurants.  The camp sites, are well sized and mostly shaded.  The facilities are very well maintained, and clean.  The staff are very friendly and welcoming, and kept us well informed via SMS on relevant matters.  Highly recommended.

Great spot to all amenities but the care and attention to the park has gone down hill not to mention the bluddy mess that the possums make when they piss and shit all over the roof of the caravan ( very hard to clean off ) so in my opinion more Hassel than it's worth will not be stay at the jetty caravan park any more
Des Bennett

We had a great stay for a week over Christmas.  The managers are very friendly and helpful to make your stay a happy experience. |The beach is within walking distance which is great for a morning swim before breakfast.|We will definitely recommend this tourist park to friends and will be happy to stay here next time we visit Busselton.
Great location and no issues during our stay. It would just be nice to have a flat site for the motorhome as it can’t be levelled the way caravans can, so that made it a bit uncomfortable.
Van close to amenities & not far to beach. Trees good for shade but need to take care with larger caravans. Power & water.
Great location & tidy camp ground
We caravanning. The staff were so helpful on the phone, in person and the ground staff. Lovely shady spots, clean amenities
Michael was lovely to show me around to available sites. Professional and polite. Would recommend. And also super close walking distance to the jetty and surrounding restaurants and breweries

A lovely park in a great location walking distance to the beach, shops cafes and restaurants. There's also a fully fenced oval nearby which is great for dogs.
Definitely a better experience with the new management Michael and Kye they are so friendly as are their staff. Being shown into your site saves a lot of arguments 😆
Clean amenities. Just make sure you bring plenty of mozzie repellent!

This caravan park is under new management and it is a great place to stay to explore this beautiful area.  We appreciated the very efficient service Michael offered by helping my husband to reverse into our space before I’d even come back from checking in! I was concerned about the reviews I’d read about bike thieves and had no issues with this at all.  We just used our common  sense and kept our bikes locked up and covered at the back of our van.  I highly recommend taking bikes as the 26km bike path to Dunsborough is fantastic! The park is well set out and organised, in an excellent location in a beautiful city with plenty to do.   Would come back in a heartbeat!

This is an aging hotel, still very clean and comfortable but I found the noise from the pool area uncomfortable .
Spa  was nice but it seems they struggle to keep up with maintenance of the venue.
Nice park, great location

Great location and nice tidy park....just beware of leaving anything out !
We had 2 gas bottles and an outdoor heater stolen, another camper nearby had an esky stolen.
The location of the caravan park is fantastic, 5 minutes walk to Busselton Jetty and surrounding restaurants, cafes and brewery. The staff were very friendly.
Fab location and the best toilet and shower blocks I've come across.

Sadly bad weather meant we couldn’t go on the jetty … they could do with a method for when you can’t use the train … we had come several thousand k to see . There is a visitor centre and for payment we get to see the marine discovery centre . It’s one room interactive and with videos . Lovely but could be expanded
Great place

If u want 1 night,forget it,gota pay for 2 (minimum) $154 for 2 nights for 2 adults and 2 kids. |And no access to their dirty kichen,no electricty at all no lights,fridge freezer dirty kettle and microwave no power. |And for the price u think they would have at least dish washing liquid. |No kid related playground for that price either: way over priced for wat u actually get.

Don’t bother booking this site.
Rude staff, overpriced for the size, you have to share the power box with 4 other camp sites. Only 1 amenities block for the entire camp site.
隔壁（真的是隔壁）就是墓园，现在10:30了，墓园方向（也有可能是墓园对面方向）还在放disco，第一次住营地这么吵的
At 1.8kms this is the longest Jetty in the Souther Hemisphere. $4 let's you walk it or fish from it, and a bit more gets you on the slowest train in Australia.

Location wise it is a very handy walk to Busselton Jetty, beach and Park. Check in is tricky wihen towing a caravan due to limited area to pull up in. Small and busy park, with pretty tight spaces.
Avoid Site 26! In our opinion it shouldn’t even be a site. It is right at the end of a very narrow road, right on the exit point. Which staff seem to use as an entry point too. Directly opposite the site, maintenance park their Utes, store bins and delivery vans park for short periods as well. So constant coming and goings in a very tight area. Then there is the noise of the bins constantly being moved in and around and to add to that, there is constant busy traffic movement lined up at nearby roundabout next to you.
Handy Park location wise, it was clean and tidy, staff ok, but after spending 5 nights here, we found it to be way too noisy. Obviously amplified due to the site we were allocated.
Busselton itself is absolutely beautiful, if you’re looking for some peace and quiet, and have a large Van, most likely not the Park for you and definitely not site 26!!
Good location to shops and restaurants. Older shower block.
Lovely ladies at the reception plus all the workers they do a great job
Family day trip always refreshing to get away.

As per telephone conversation with Rosalie this morning this reservation was not cancelled on the 6/3 but on the 16/3.  I tried to do the right thing in a crisis situation and you have taken the money and given false information on the date of cancellation.  I made the reservations on the 10th of March.  Funny how I cancelled before I even made the reservation according to you.  This matter was not handled well.  I agree I should have just left the reservation and possibly not shown up but your employees have also made an error and you are not willing to acknowledge this.  This is definitely not good enough.
Annelle Oldenburg-Morgan

Stayed here 4 times now 2 camping loved it great location could walk to everywhere we needed to go to. 2 in cabins 1st time in cabin stay was great four of us 1 double bed and then bunk beds with a large couch in lounge. This stay in the more expensive cabin was very disappointing only 5⭐️ was the location right on the front. Cabin 6 was vile had a horrible smell to it sleeping 5 people it had 2 bedrooms one with a double bed 1 with bunk beds with a small double bed at the bottom. Bed1 was OK bed2 no power points and oh my God don't get me started on the old shitty mattresses we would of slept better on the floor.... the bathroom was tiny and the 2 seater couch for 5 people mmm need I say more....our previous cabin was for 4 and that was bigger than this poker cabin no6....we cut our stay short couldn't do another night in those beds. Reception staff were lovely on the phone for our late arrival but absolutely vile on check out....next time I think we will stick to camping our beds are way more comfy and we can bring our dog.
Had a wonderful tour. Everyone was very professional and friendly and helpful.

Fabulous location right near the jetty. Walking distance to everything. Friendly staff and efficient maintenance crew. Some of the rooms and amenities are a bit “tired” however so it would be good to see the City council investing a bit to upgrade this aspect. Hopefully the council will continue to own this excellent city centre site so that ordinary folk will continue to enjoy it for years to come, and will not take the short term decision to sell the land, which surely would be worth millions.

I had same experience as Christina
Did NOT have cancellation policy explained to me when I booked despite what the rude & abrupt woman on phone this morning told me.
That lady needs to go to “how to interact with people classes (particularly customers)” as she shouldn’t be working at the front desk or the phones with her attitude.
My cancelled booking (still holiday dates)will be taken up before the end of today - guaranteed!!

It’s an iconic jetty extending 1.85kms over the ocean.. beautiful walk, awesome train ride too, well maintained jetty. I did the underwater tour also and was pleasantly surprised. Our guide was knowledgeable and humorous.. she had a mammoth crowd and each person was made to feel special.

Just to be aware when booking.

We booked to stay 14 days before we arrived. Due to work, we had to cancel the next day, but because we were not with the 28-day cancellation, we lost our payment (full payment was made). I do feel this 28 days is extreme for some cases, as we booked (31.11.24) and then cancelled (1.12.24) the next day, but only had 14 days , not 28 days.
Make sure you wear proper footwear - longer walk than you think.
Solid park. Spot sizes are not the best but it is a price you pay for great location next to the jetty. Amenities could be improved but it was quite OK.
Great location , safe parking , spotlessly clean cabin , friendly staff .
Really good!

Great peaceful caravan park in an awesome location.
Recommend
Alter heruntergekommener Campingplatz. Plätze sind uneben und zu nahe aufeinander. Kein Zaun und direkt am der Strasse. WC-Anlagen sind alt, jedoch sauber. Frau am Empfang ist unfreundlich
Located well.  Very near jetty precinct.  Quite a tight park.  The exhaust fan went all night in amenities.  Very annoying.  amenities were very clean.

I love where this park is, as it is walking distance to shops, restaurants, cafes, the jetty and water front. Great for bikes, ride for miles on safe tracks.
We stayed here years ago with no issues but sadly there were a few thefts happening. I had a pair of sketches taken from outside the door.
Others had e-bikes and trikes taken.
The park is open to the streets with no fencing and no security. Shame but that's the society we live in.
Very convenient  location  close too all attractions. Staff very accommodating  and helpful. Good  clean facilities  and park. Quiet at night  would  highly  recommend.

Stayed in a powered site in own van across road from Jetty. Even though site was on road it wasnt noisey. Close walking to everywhere. Staff were alp friendly  and amenities very clean. Sites are a good size as well. We planned 2 nights and stayed 4 as its a great base for Margaret River as well whichbis only a 30min drive away.
Great park. Friendly staff and close to shopping centres and beach and eating

I would not recommend this park. Sites are very uneven and my partner had a panic attack over the vibes she was getting from the park. We payed for 5 nights, and decided to leave, no refund given. We were told lots of theft in this park occurs. We moved onto another park in town.
Stayed in our owe caravan. Great weekend lazying around doing nothing.  Pub's  for lunch & dinner 🍽

Very uneven site with low branches/ trees.Unable to get level in this sandpit.YOU must stop traffic to get in as you park facing the road.Requested easier site but they were worse!. Location is a big positive.
Reception unhelpful! Not coming back.Do not recommend to anyone.
Friendly receptionist, clean park.
Sites are a good size, staff are friendly and helpful.

Centrally located and walking distance to the jetty precinct.
Ammenities older but clean, nice grounds staff, office lady a bit abrupt.
Love Busselton Jetty such an awesome place to pass the time of day

Spent a weekend camping, and I have to say this is definitely one of the cleanest and spacious sites I've stayed! All the amenities you would need and the toilets/showers are super clean. Friendly staff too. Fantastic location and a short walk to the jetty, beach, restaurants and town centre. Highly recommend!

Had a great morning at The Busselton Jetty. We walked both ways which took us about 30 mins each way. We did the fast tour which was so worth it. The staff have a great knowledge and are really friendly m. The view is stunning and the number of fish you can see in the observatory is amazing

Excellent shady Park, lots trees.|Close to beach, short walk.|Great facilities and town walking distance.|Perfect for holidays all ages.|Great cabins.|Great BBQ, ablutions, green grass.|Good access.|Great for kids, playing fields opposite.|Large shady sites.|Managers close but not annoying.|Perfect stay. Recommend way above peppermint grove beach park which is noisy, has less shade, small donga accom and far less facilities.|Also better beach and closer walk to beach.|Here only 100m to beach-peppy beach is 500m-hardly a short walk.|Recommend busselton jetty caravan park over all others, relaxed, friendly, shady.

Leider gibt es kein WiFi!
Jedoch ist der Jetti sowie viele Bars und Restaurants mühelos zu Fuss erreichbar!

Great location for playing sports , train ride up and down Jetty.
Variety of different shops and restaurants.
Shady grass areas under the tree's for people with picnics.
Special occasions and events welcomed.
Bbq area and tables and chairs, Amenities close by, playground equipment .
Parking spaces and disable parking spaces available.
Bathrooms need upgrading in section 3
Did a group booking 1 month in advance to be close to each other … one group is in one of the other parks … that is really a disappointment .. what is the purpose of group bookings then.
This is our favourite park in Busselton, always clean, friendly staff and the perfect location!
Excellent campsite close to the center.
Super Platz sehr Nahe am Meer...sehr sauber..Unser Platz wurde sofort vom Laub befreit als wir parkiert haben...unglaublich zuvorkommend...herzlichen Dank
Very convenient location, close to shops and cafes, nice clean facilities. Opposite Busselton Jetty.

Awesome location
Clean facilities
Friendly staff
Awesome spot, walking distance to jetty, foreshore and many eating and drinking places. Excellent hot showers
Nice shady Park, great position, very helpful operators
Great spot but a few sewerage smells around the camp.
Friendly reception staff.  Can walk to the jetty and shops easily from this park
Caravan sites EXCELLENT 👏🙂

We had a powered caravan site. It was over the road from the beach and cafes. Amazing location. The owners were friendly.
Clean  park. Will return .
Wish I could have stayed a bit longer to explore. Receptionist was super helpful.

Great caravan park, been here many times. Unfortunately this time there was a lady close by with a dog always off the lead. Witnessed it on more than one occasion barking at and chasing people as they walked by ...even a man in a wheelchair. I tried to let a groundsman and the office know but no luck in getting something done about the dog. It would be better if the management of the park enforced their 'on the lead" rules when advised of a problem.

It's advertised that "dogs must be kept on a leash at all times". Numerous dogs running around OFF leads. Barking, chasing people walking past. I mentioned it a couple of times to workers from the park and nothing was done. Very annoying and not inclined to return.
It was ok I guess I had high expectations that were not met

Units very basic considering we booked the 2nd most expensive. The unit had beds for 5 but a little 2 seater couch and not even a small coffee table. The only other furniture was a  chest of drawers and a dining table with 5 chairs. At $169 per night in the off peak season I didn't feel it was value for money.
Great little park, central and close to the jetty and restaurants. Very tidy and clean.
Lovely park
Basic caravan park. Showers are interesting,  hard to have a decent shower. Location excellent.
Very good price for one of the cabins. The lady at the desk was very nice and helpful. Will probably return
